title: Knapped
description: Use flint for decorative stone blocks!
body:
Have you ever collected a ton of flint while playing Minecraft and wondered, "What could I do with all this flint?" Knapped solves that through the power of decorative blocks! Knap the flint into bricks to make a grayish brick palette or create various patterns of robust stone flushwork!

Credit to [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) for an easy-to-learn and easy-to-use mod-making system! :D
Join the Discord [here](https://discord.com/invite/ASkVBubyzH) for future updates on my mods!
For more information, visit the [wiki](https://anotherpedia.com/#Knapped%20(Minecraft%20mod))!

 

Combining two Flint (or cutting Flint in a Stonecutter) creates the Knapped Flint Brick. The family of Knapped Flint Bricks adds a new palette for brick-based builds!
![Flint brick family.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbf7e218b81fe9278e084ae654037c0bddb2a408.png)

Knapped Flint Bricks can be added to Stone, Polished Granite, Polished Diorite, Polished Andesite, Smooth Stone, Smooth Sandstone, Smooth Red Sandstone, and Smooth Quartz to create various flushwork patterns!
![The flushworks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bed006a55264ef1e4887f2b8182306525d189c1b.png)
